result.stdout:
Usage: ServiceBusSpy [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add           Adds a message to a queue.
  clear         Sends all messages from a queue to the dead letter queue.
  list          Lists all messages from a queue.
  subscribe     Subscribes to a queue and shows all existing and new messages.

Run 'ServiceBusSpy [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: ServiceBusSpy [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add           Adds a message to a queue.
  clear         Sends all messages from a queue to the dead letter queue.
  list          Lists all messages from a queue.
  subscribe     Subscribes to a queue and shows all existing and new messages.

Run 'ServiceBusSpy [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Adds a message to a queue.

Usage: ServiceBusSpy add [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  Message                                    The message content as string.

Options:
  -q|--queue <QUEUE>                         The name of the queue to add the message to.
  -c|--connectionString <CONNECTION_STRING>  The connection string of your service bus.
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information

commands.payload:

  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information

result.stdout:
Sends all messages from a queue to the dead letter queue.

Usage: ServiceBusSpy clear [options]

Options:
  -q|--queue <QUEUE>                         The name of the queue to add the message to.
  -c|--connectionString <CONNECTION_STRING>  The connection string of your service bus.
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information

Options:

result.stdout:
Lists all messages from a queue.

Usage: ServiceBusSpy list [options]

Options:
  -q|--queue <QUEUE>                         The name of the queue to add the message to.
  -c|--connectionString <CONNECTION_STRING>  The connection string of your service bus.
  -v|--verbose                               Outputs the message as JSON instead of the content only
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information

commands.payload:
Lists all messages from a queue.

  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information
